features: Advanced Plug-In with Anti-Fading Technology for always noticeable amazing fragrance
Delight in an indulgent, nutty, fragrance of sweet vanilla and creamy shea butter, complemented by a light touch of lemon and orange notes
Infused with 2x more essential oils* (*vs existing Air Wick Plug-In Refills)
Amazing fragrance lasting up to 100 days* (*lowest setting for 12hr usage / day)
description: Product Description Air Wick Electrical Plug-In Refill infused with 2x more essential oils* for amazing fragrance that fills your room. Each refill lasts for up to 100 days** (*vs existing Air Wick Plug-In Refills; **12 hr/day on lowest setting). Air Freshener. Airwick. Ingredients Contains: Dipropylene glycol monomethyl ether, BENZYL ACETATE, LINALOOL, ETHYL VANILLIN, Ethyl maltol, VANILLIN, LIMONENE, Tetramethyl acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, GAMMAUNDECALACTONE, 2,6-DIMETHYL-7-OCTEN2-OL, 2-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, p-Methoxybenzaldehyde, 5-(2,2,3-Trimethyl3-cyclopentenyl)-3-methylpentan-2-ol, HELIOTROPINE, CITRONELLOL, CITRAL, ALLYL CYCLOHEXYLPROPIONATE, ALLYL HEPTANOATE, HYDROXYCITRONELLAL, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, Benzenepropanal, 2-methyl4-(2-methylpropyl)-, DELTA-DAMASCONE, Lemon, ext., COUMARIN, ISOEUGENOL
